carousel_description_ru: Он старался весь день: готовил, покупал, дарил неловко.
carousel_description_en: A regular guy tried all day: cooked, shopped, gifted awkwardly.
labels: ["чем-то занимаюсь...", "не уроню, обещаю!", "смотрю и думаю...", "вот так вот, клубничка...", "всё для тебя...", "завтрак готова!", "это... немного... не то...", "вот, подарок! открывай!", "это я, сюрприз!", "я молодец!", "но... немного неловко...", "осторожно с вазой...", "показала, что могу!", "кинуло удачу...", "на, это тебе...", "смотри, какая лента!"]
labels_en: ["I'm doing something...", "won't drop it, promise!", "just looking and thinking...", "here's some strawberries...", "it's all for you...", "breakfast's ready!", "this... kinda not it...", "here, a gift! open it!", "it's me, surprise!", "I did good!", "but... kinda awkward...", "careful with the vase...", "showed I can do it!", "sent some luck...", "here, this one's for you...", "look, what a ribbon!"]
scene_descriptions: ["{subject} chest-up, stirring a large mixing pot, flour smudge on cheek, perplexed frown.", "{subject} waist-up, sliding into a bright yellow raincoat while balancing five overflowing shopping bags, breathless determination.", "{subject} chest-up, unfolding a tiny crumpled receipt, knitted eyebrows, awkward proud attempt at understanding.", "{subject} waist-up, shrugging off a fitted blazer while tangled in tape, offering a lopsided parcel, hopeful.", "{subject} chest-up, one hand tucked behind back as if concealing something, other hand waving casual, embarrassed smile.", "{subject} waist-up, pulling a lightweight cardigan over shoulders while balancing an invisible tray, chin proudly lifted.", "{subject} chest-up, clutching something near collarbone, fingers stained faintly, lips pressed tight, anxious wide-eyed stare.", "{subject} waist-up, down on one knee, presenting a tiny velvet box with solemn, unwavering intensity.", "{subject} waist-up, shrugging into a cozy scarf while peeking around an enormous teddy bear, only wide eyes visible.", "{subject} chest-up, both thumbs jabbed toward chest, broad proud grin, chest slightly puffed in playfulness.", "{subject} chest-up, palm extended as if showing something imperfect, sheepish apologetic half-smile, cheeks blushing.", "{subject} waist-up, fastening an apron over a striped shirt while miming careful balancing, forced cautious steps.", "{subject} chest-up, thumbs-up jabbed proudly at chest, grin tight with embarrassed bravado, eyes steady.", "{subject} chest-up, swinging a lightweight denim jacket off one shoulder mid-blow, puckered lips, eyes slightly squinted.", "{subject} waist-up, offering a badly folded handwritten note with trembling fingers, throat-tilt hinting hopeful anticipation.", "{subject} chest-up, pointing at a small lapel detail with embarrassed pride, mouth barely parted in shy triumph."]
